extension.summary: LibTV - Your Kodi Library as Real TV
extension.description: Turn your movies and TV shows into linear channels with full TV guide support. Generates an M3U playlist and XMLTV guide for PVR IPTV Simple Client, with plugin-resolved streams so channels play whatever is currently on air.
extension.news:
v0.6.0: add "Auto-generate channels by studio" alongside the existing genre autotune. Guide entries now include a star rating, an "unwatched" flag, and both SxxEyy and zero-based episode numbering. The resolver now guards against hammering the library with repeated rebuilds if Kodi re-invokes it rapidly for a broken channel. The observed-duration cache now self-invalidates on upgrade instead of trusting a possibly stale format.
v0.5.0: add "Auto-generate channels by genre" — one click creates a channel per library genre instead of configuring them by hand. Richer TV guide entries (release year, MPAA rating, director/cast, artwork). Guide refresh now retries itself shortly after playback ends instead of waiting for the next scheduled rebuild. Episode/movie durations missing from library metadata now self-correct after the item is played once. Join-in-progress seek handoff now uses a ListItem property as its primary path (pending_seek.json kept as a fallback pending live verification).
